actions.script: var el = document.querySelector('textarea[placeholder*="Message DeepSeek"]') || document.querySelector('textarea[placeholder*="Message"]') || document.querySelector('textarea.ds-scroll-area') || document.querySelector('textarea'); if (!el) throw new Error('textarea not found'); el.focus(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 300)); el.value = ''; el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 200)); var nativeInputValueSetter = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(window.HTMLTextAreaElement.prototype, 'value').set; nativeInputValueSetter.call(el, '${message}'); el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); var btn = document.querySelector('.focused [class*="ds-icon-button--sizing-container"]:last-child') || document.querySelector('button[aria-label="Send"]') || document.querySelector('button[aria-label="Submit"]'); if (!btn) throw new Error('send button not found'); btn.click(); return 'message_sent';

await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 5000)); var prev = ''; var stable = 0; for (var i = 0; i < 60; i++) { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000)); var els = document.querySelectorAll('div.ds-message div.ds-markdown'); if (els.length === 0) { els = document.querySelectorAll('div.ds-markdown'); } if (els.length === 0) { els = document.querySelectorAll('div[class*="markdown"]'); } if (els.length > 0) { var txt = els[els.length - 1].innerText || ''; if (txt.length > 0 && txt === prev) { stable++; if (stable >= 2) { return txt; } } else { stable = 0; prev = txt; } } } return prev || '';
